flavorPhrases: Jammed into a rock crevice above the tideline, sealed in a waterproofed oilcloth roll.
The sea-cave narrows at the back. A ledge, invisible at high tide, holds this.
Beneath a cairn of wave-smoothed stones on the strand.
Lashed to the underside of a pier strut, just above the high-water mark.
{container}, wedged in a hull breach. The seal held. Just.
The hollow in the driftwood is deeper than it looks. Oilcloth inside, still intact.
